title: PII scan detects email
description: scan_payload should detect an email address in the payload
clause: GA-03-REQ-01: scan_payload MUST detect email addresses

input.user_msg: Contact me at alice@example.com for details

title: PII scan detects SSN
description: scan_payload should detect US Social Security numbers
clause: GA-03-REQ-02: scan_payload MUST detect SSN patterns

title: PII scan returns match_count and sensitivity
description: Each PIIScanHit must include match_count >= 1 and a sensitivity level
clause: GA-03-REQ-03: PIIScanHit MUST include match_count and sensitivity fields

title: Credit card Luhn validation
description: scan_payload must reject credit-card-like numbers that fail Luhn check
clause: GA-03-REQ-04: Credit card detection MUST apply Luhn validation
